transcript: Speaker A (Woman): ಅಣ್ಣ, scanner ಕೊಡ್ತೀರಾ? [Brother, will you give the scanner?] Speaker B (Driver): Sorry madam, actually my UPI is currently blocked. Can you please pay in cash? Speaker A: Wow ಅಣ್ಣ, ಇಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ English ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [Wow brother, how are you speaking English so well?] Speaker B: It is because of MySivi, ma'am. Speaker A: MySivi? ಅದು ಏನು? [MySivi? What is that?] Speaker B: ಹೌದು madam, ಈ app ಅಲ್ಲಿರೋ AI teacher ನಮಗೆ daily step-by-step process ಮೂಲಕ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ English ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15 ರಿಂದ 20 ನಿಮಿಷ ಕೊಟ್ಟರೆ ಸಾಕು madam, within 30 days ನಮ್ಮ English ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ improve ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. [Yes madam, the AI teacher in this app teaches us English from Kannada daily through a step-by-step process. Just 15 to 20 minutes a day is enough, within 30 days our English will improve awesome.] Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? ಹೇಗೆ manage ಮಾಡಿದ್ರಿ? [But it must be very costly, right? How did you manage?] Speaker B: ಏನಿಲ್ಲ madam, ನೀವು ಕೊಡೋ ಬಾಡಿಗೆಗಿಂತ ಕಮ್ಮಿ, ಬರಿ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿ. Trial ಅಲ್ಲಿ app ಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ use ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. [Nothing madam, less than the rent you pay, just one rupee. You can use the app fully in the trial.] Speaker A: Super ಅಣ್ಣ, ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app install ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ. [Super brother, then I will install the MySivi app right now.] Speaker B: MySivi app install ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ English journey ಯನ್ನ ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Install MySivi app, start your English journey right now.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಅಣ್ಣ SCANNER [Brother, scanner] | SORRY MADAM ACTUALLY MY UPI IS CURRENTLY BLOCKED CAN YOU PLEASE PAY IN CASH | CASH WOW ಅಣ್ಣ [Cash wow brother] | ENGLISH ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [How are you speaking English?] | MYSIVI MA'AM | MYSIVI? ಅದು ಏನು? [MySivi? What is that?] | ಹೌದು MADAM ಈ APP [Yes madam, this app] | TEACHER ನಮಗೆ [Teacher to us] | DAILY STEP BY STEP PROCESS | ಮೂಲಕ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ [through Kannada itself] | ENGLISH ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ [teaches English] | 15-20 MINS | ನಿಮಿಷ ಕೊಟ್ಟರೆ [minutes if given] | ಸಾಕು MADAM WITHIN [enough madam within] | 30 DAYS | ನಮ್ಮ ENGLISH [our English] | ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ [awesome] | ಆಗುತ್ತೆ ಆದ್ರೆ [will happen but] | ತುಂಬಾ COSTLY [very costly] | ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? [must be right?] | ಹೇಗೆ MANAGE ಮಾಡಿದ್ರಿ? [how did you manage?] | ಏನಿಲ್ಲ MADAM [nothing madam] | ನೀವು ಕೊಡೋ ಬಾಡಿಗೆಗಿಂತ [than the rent you give] | ಕಮ್ಮಿ ಬರಿ [less, just] | 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿ [1 rupee] | TRIAL ಅಲ್ಲಿ APP [in trial app] | ಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ [fully] | ಮಾಡಬಹುದು SUPER [can do super] | ಅಣ್ಣ ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ [brother then] | ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ [I right now] | MYSIVI | APP INSTALL | ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ [will do] | MYSIVI APP | INSTALL ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ [install] | ನಿಮ್ಮ ENGLISH [your English] | JOURNEY ಯನ್ನ [journey] | ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ [start right now] | MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An auto driver surprises a passenger with fluent English learned from the MySivi app. He explains that the app teaches English from Kannada in 15-20 minutes daily, with a 3-day trial available for 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
